name: auto-eng-terminal
description: Switch the macOS input source to English when using the VS Code terminal.

commands.title: Auto ENG Terminal: Switch Input Source Now
Auto ENG Terminal: Focus Terminal and Switch Input Source
Auto ENG Terminal: Create New Terminal and Switch Input Source

autoEngTerminal.enabled.description: Enable automatic input-source switching for terminal-related actions.

autoEngTerminal.inputSourceId.description: The macOS input source ID to switch to when terminal-related actions fire.

autoEngTerminal.imSelectPath.description: Optional absolute path to im-select. Leave empty to probe common locations.

autoEngTerminal.switchOnStartup.description: Switch when VS Code starts and a terminal is already active.

autoEngTerminal.switchOnOpenTerminal.description: Switch after a new terminal is opened.

autoEngTerminal.switchOnActiveTerminalCh.description: Switch when the active terminal changes.

autoEngTerminal.switchDebounceMs.description: Minimum time between automatic switch attempts.

autoEngTerminal.startupDelayMs.description: Delay before the startup switch check runs.

autoEngTerminal.terminalOpenDelayMs.description: Delay before switching after a terminal is opened.

autoEngTerminal.terminalCommandDelayMs.description: Delay before switching after the extension's terminal commands run.

autoEngTerminal.showMissingDependencyWar.description: Show a warning if im-select cannot be resolved.

autoEngTerminal.enableDebugLogs.description: Enable verbose logging in the Auto ENG Terminal output channel.

scripts.pretest: npm run compile && npm run lint
